news.t: Acuitas Investments Brings Its Institutional Acumen for Small and Microcap Investing to the ETF Universe With the Launch of the Acuitas Small Cap Active ETF (AIMS)

holdings.infoBox: AIMS is an equity ETF with a total of 285 individual holdings. The top holdings are PDF Solutions stock at 2.22%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 1.99%, Ligand Pharmaceuticals at 1.56%, Covenant Logistics Group at 1.39%, and Triumph Financial at 1.25%.

overview.description: The Acuitas Small Cap Active ETF (AIMS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks long-term capital appreciation with reduced volatility through exposure to US small-cap companies. Stock selection uses a multi-manager approach. AIMS was launched on Feb 10, 2026 and is issued by Acuitas.
